decisions.summary: Use existing CommandDeck queries (useActivityQuery, usePrQuery) in InspectorPanel to share cache and avoid duplicate backend work.
Port reviewer summary, test cycle counter, PR status, last activity, session count, and pipeline stuck banner from OverviewTab to InspectorPanel. Keep inspector compact — use condensed layouts.
Added useActivityQuery to InspectorPanel for last activity and session count. Placed Activity section between workspace path and Links.
Reviewer summary uses compact 5-col grid with colored dots and round numbers instead of full RoundCard. Fits narrow inspector slide-out.

hazards.summary: InspectorPanel is rendered in a narrow slide-out. Adding too much content could make it unwieldy.
hazards.mitigation: Keep new sections compact. Use horizontal layouts where possible. Only show reviewer summary when data exists.

hazards.summary: Activity query polling could be expensive if many inspectors are open.
hazards.mitigation: Shared QueryClient cache means only one fetch per issue regardless of how many components query it. Use same query keys as OverviewTab.

resumePoint.description: Implementing bead workspace-o1gi — add tests cycle counter to InspectorPanel. ReviewStatus already has verificationCycleCount and verificationMaxCycles. Need to display this in ReviewPipelineSection or a new compact Tests subsection.

sessionHistory.note: Started implementation of PAN-954. No prior continue file. Created 6 beads based on issue checklist and initialized planning artifacts.
Completed bead workspace-n99r — added last activity timestamp and session count to InspectorPanel using useActivityQuery from CommandDeck tabs. Typecheck passed.
Completed bead workspace-r490 — added compact 5-col reviewer summary snapshot to InspectorPanel using activity reviewer sections. Typecheck passed.
